summary: Attempted comprehensive testing of new features (Onboarding, Profile settings, Dashboard charts, Kanban drag-and-drop, Resume download). Frontend routing and component structure verified, but backend infrastructure issues prevent full functionality testing.

critical_bugs.issue: Supabase database tables not created - jobs, applications, user_profiles, interviews tables missing
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all data-dependent functionality - 500 errors on most API calls

critical_bugs.issue: PostgreSQL error: Could not find tables in schema cache
critical_bugs.impact: Profile settings, Dashboard charts, Kanban board cannot load data

critical_bugs.issue: interviews table missing from Supabase schema

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: LLM Budget exceeded - OpenAI budget limit reached
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Need to increase LLM budget or use different API key

integration_issues.issue: Supabase Google authentication provider not enabled
integration_issues.impact: Cannot authenticate to test protected components

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access Onboarding, Profile, Dashboard, Kanban, Resume pages due to authentication failure

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly at root '/'
Login page renders with all authentication options
All protected routes properly redirect to login (security working)
Frontend component imports and routing structure verified

success_percentage.backend: 16.7% (1/6 core APIs working, Supabase database not configured)
success_percentage.frontend: 50% (routing and security working, but components cannot be tested due to auth/backend issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Supabase database setup - create missing tables (jobs, applications, user_profiles, interviews) using schema.sql and schema_update.sql. Enable Google authentication provider in Supabase. Resolve LLM budget/API key issue. Only after these fixes can the new features be properly tested.
